features: 4 PACK AA: With easy open packaging for your convenience, the 4 pack of AA size batteries have a capacity of 800mAh. Charging device sold separately.

RECHARGEABLE: The rechargeable hybrid technology (nickel-metal hydride) allows for less waste than with standard disposable alkaline batteries and are more affordable overall. Save money and reduce waste with AccuPower batteries.
UNIVERSAL SIZE: AA batteries are suitable for many devices including remote controls, radios, lights and much more.

UP TO 1000 CHARGES: Provides long lasting power to your everyday devices with up to 1000 charges. The batteries have a long lasting shelf life when unused to keep until they are required, with 80% energy retention after 1 year.
SAFE: The batteries contain 0% of harmful metals cadmium and mercury. Each battery casing prevents leakage to protect your family's devices and is made up of anti-corrosion components.
description: From the manufacturer Designed for everday use, with power that lasts. Lloytron rechargeable batteries offer reliable power for every device, from everyday use to pre-charged ready to use convenience. Choose the Right Rechargable Batteries for Your Devices Everday Power Type: Standard NiMH rechargeable Charging: Must be charged before first use Capacity / Benefit: Affordable reliable for simple devices Recommended Usage: TV remotes, clocks, wireless mice, simple toys Reliable Performance Type: Standard NiMH rechargeable Charging: Must be charged before first use Capacity / Benefit: Medium Capacity for consistent power in everyday gadgets Recommended Usage: Torches, handheld games, cameras, portable speakers Instant Power Type: Hybrid NiMH (Ready to use) rechargeable Charging: Pre-charged to 80% for immediate use and fully rechargeable Capacity / Benefit: Convenient and ready to go Recommended Usage: Travel, gifting, or any device you'd like to use immediately Maximum Performance Type: Standard NiMH rechargeable Charging: Must be charged before first use Capacity / Benefit: High capacity for demanding, high drain devices Recommended Usage: Digital cameras, motorised toys, LCD gadgets, devices using multiple batteries Complete Your Power Setup with Lloytron Battery Chargers Designed to work seamlessly with our NiMH and Ready-to-Use batteries, Lloytron chargers ensure your batteries are always ready. Fast, efficient, and safe - perfect for home, office or travel.
